Doomsday (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $11,008,770Details
International Box Office $10,612,418
Worldwide Box Office $21,621,188
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,198,100
Total $9,198,100
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,926,565 (44.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.23 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$33,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,936 opening theaters/1,938 max. theaters, 2.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $18,337,730

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 14th, 2008 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: July 29th, 2008 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, language and some sexual content/nudity.
Running Time: 109 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue
Geographical setting: Scotland, United Kingdom
Plot point: Mutants
Social setting: Dystopia, Epidemic, Post Apocalypse
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Time period setting: 2000s, 2030s, Near Future
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Rogue Pictures, Intrepid Pictures, Crystal Sky Pictures, Scion Films
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States, Germany, South Africa
Languages: English
